overview.description: Czech AI education company offering online courses, webinars, and workshops on AI tools
overview.description_long: AI Institute (aiinstitute.cz) is a Czech AI upskilling platform founded by Daniel Kosec and Ondřej Hlaváč in 2022. The company sells online courses, webinars, ebooks, and prompt packs focused on practical use of ChatGPT and other AI tools for productivity. They serve both individual learners and corporate clients (Seznam.cz, RE/MAX Czech, Century21, KKCG). Boasts 12,000+ course graduates and 16,000+ newsletter subscribers. Operates under AI Institute s.r.o., registered in Karlovy Vary, Czech Republic.
overview.tagline: Vzděláváme ve světě umělé inteligence (We educate in the world of artificial intelligence)

history.origin_story: Founded in December 2022 by Daniel Kosec and Ondřej Hlaváč after observing the transformative impact of ChatGPT and AI tools on productivity. Formally registered as AI Institute s.r.o. in February 2024.

key_milestones.event: Founded as AI education project following ChatGPT launch
Formally registered as AI Institute s.r.o. (IČ: 21258554)
Reached 12,000+ course graduates and 16,000+ newsletter subscribers

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Core product is teaching people to use ChatGPT and AI tools — as AI interfaces become more intuitive and self-explanatory, demand for third-party AI literacy courses will erode. No proprietary AI technology; entirely dependent on reselling knowledge about other companies' tools.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI upskilling is a real and currently booming market with corporate demand, evidenced by partnerships with Seznam.cz and KKCG. However the market is crowded with free YouTube content, official vendor docs, and large EdTech players, compressing pricing power.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external investment; appears bootstrapped with a small team of ~5 people. Registered as s.r.o. only in February 2024 suggesting an early-stage operation with no public runway signals.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: High AGI displacement risk (core product is AI-tools education that becomes self-obsoleting) combined with no known funding and a very small team creates significant fragility. The 12,000+ graduate community provides some moat but is insufficient to offset structural vulnerability.

metadata.notes: Category in index is 'research_group' but AI Institute is clearly a commercial AI education company (b2c_saas), not a research group. Company is headquartered in Karlovy Vary, not Prague. Formally registered February 2024 but operational since December 2022. Website built on Kajabi platform. Also operates aidovednosti.cz (AI workshop sub-brand).
